Luxury fades with time… craftsmanship brings it back❤️

Honestly, this has been one of the most disappointing luxury shopping experiences I’ve had. I purchased these shoes from Level Shoes expecting premium quality and service, but received an item that appears damaged/used with visible defects on the material.

What made it worse was the customer service experience. Instead of trying to resolve the issue properly, I was simply told that no return or exchange is possible basically forcing me to keep an item I cannot even use.

I understand policies, but when a customer receives a damaged product, there should be accountability and professionalism. The item can easily be inspected and resold if it truly meets standards, but expecting a customer to accept defective goods is unacceptable, especially from a luxury retailer.

Very poor communication, no proper solution offered, and extremely disappointing after spending a significant amount of money. I genuinely hope someone from management contacts me because this is not the level of service expected from a company like Level Shoes.”

Zaid wears EYTYS and Le Specs. Read the full editorial on levelshoes.com and tune into our Sounds of Summer at the link in our bio.

firstComment:
Honestly, this has been one of the most disappointing luxury shopping experiences I’ve had. I purchased these shoes from Level Shoes expecting premium quality and service, but received an item that appears damaged/used with visible defects on the material.

What made it worse was the customer service experience. Instead of trying to resolve the issue properly, I was simply told that no return or exchange is possible basically forcing me to keep an item I cannot even use.

I understand policies, but when a customer receives a damaged product, there should be accountability and professionalism. The item can easily be inspected and resold if it truly meets standards, but expecting a customer to accept defective goods is unacceptable, especially from a luxury retailer.

Very poor communication, no proper solution offered, and extremely disappointing after spending a significant amount of money. I genuinely hope someone from management contacts me because this is not the level of service expected from a company like Level Shoes.

Where sound meets form.
Introducing Sounds of Design, an immersive installation presented during Milan Design Week 2026.

Curated by @golden.side , with cultural partner @levelshoes , the project brings together a collective of designers exploring materiality, form and perception, each contributing to a layered sonic and spatial composition shaped by @neuf_voix , in addition to a musical program curated by @antennaparadisco 

Join us from April 21–26
Via Legnano 14, Milan
10AM — 7PM

Inside the Level Listening Lounge at @milan.design.week @breradesigndistrict @fuorisalone, in partnership with @golden.side

Friends of the brand got together for Sounds of Design in Milan to experience the power of sound, through artist @neuf_voix’s sound compositions, and a curated musical playlist by @antennaparadisco 

Experience the Sounds of Design at the Level Listening Lounge until April 26 from 10am-7pm at Via Legnano 14 in Milan.
